name: Determine Pharma Supply Chain Inventory Policy
description: This process determines the inventory policy for pharmaceutical products, taking into account batch traceability, expiration dates, and regulatory requirements to ensure compliance with GxP, GMP, GDP, and ICH Q10 guidelines
sector_specific_outputs: reorder points with consideration of lead times and shelf life
regulatory_requirements: 21 CFR Part 11 electronic signature and record-keeping
compliance_frameworks: GCP for clinical trial supply chain management
notes: All automated decisions must be validated and documented per GxP, with a focus on batch traceability, electronic signatures, and audit trail maintenance. Deviation management and CAPA processes must be integrated into the inventory management system
